scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Earthquakes strike suddenly without warning, caused by shifting tectonic plates. These powerful events can disrupt infrastructure and destroy entire communities in seconds.
scenes.visual: Simple 2D flat illustration of the Earth's layers showing shifting rock plates beneath the surface.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 1: Simple 2D flat illustration of the Earth's layers showing shifting rock plates beneath the surface.. Narration context: "Earthquakes strike suddenly without warning, caused by shifting tectonic plates. These powerful events can disrupt infrastructure and destroy entire communities in seconds."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Most damage and injuries occur due to poor building construction, unsafe locations, and a lack of preparation for securing heavy interior objects.
scenes.visual: Flat 3D graphic showing a building shaking, highlighting weak foundations and loose furniture inside.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 2: Flat 3D graphic showing a building shaking, highlighting weak foundations and loose furniture inside.. Narration context: "Most damage and injuries occur due to poor building construction, unsafe locations, and a lack of preparation for securing heavy interior objects."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Start by identifying the safest places in every room. Stay clear of windows, heavy furniture, fireplaces, and unsecured exterior walls.
scenes.visual: 2D vector plan of a living room with green checkmarks marking safe spots away from glass and tall cabinets.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 3: 2D vector plan of a living room with green checkmarks marking safe spots away from glass and tall cabinets.. Narration context: "Start by identifying the safest places in every room. Stay clear of windows, heavy furniture, fireplaces, and unsecured exterior walls."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Build on stable bedrock and follow local anti-seismic building codes. Simple, symmetrical shapes and flexible materials help structures withstand intense shaking.
scenes.visual: Flat 3D graphic showing a simple rectangular building on solid rock with arrows indicating flexibility.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 4: Flat 3D graphic showing a simple rectangular building on solid rock with arrows indicating flexibility.. Narration context: "Build on stable bedrock and follow local anti-seismic building codes. Simple, symmetrical shapes and flexible materials help structures withstand intense shaking."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Secure your home by fastening heavy bookcases to walls and locking cabinet doors. Even minor retrofits dramatically reduce building collapse risks.
scenes.visual: 2D illustration of a hand securing a bookshelf bracket to a wall and placing latches on drawers.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 5: 2D illustration of a hand securing a bookshelf bracket to a wall and placing latches on drawers.. Narration context: "Secure your home by fastening heavy bookcases to walls and locking cabinet doors. Even minor retrofits dramatically reduce building collapse risks."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: If shaking starts, drop to your knees, cover your head and neck, and hold on to a sturdy table. Do not try to run.
scenes.visual: Simple 2D icon of a person dropping under a sturdy desk, holding onto one of its legs.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 6: Simple 2D icon of a person dropping under a sturdy desk, holding onto one of its legs.. Narration context: "If shaking starts, drop to your knees, cover your head and neck, and hold on to a sturdy table. Do not try to run."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: If you are outdoors, find a clear area away from buildings, power lines, and trees. Drop to the ground and stay there.
scenes.visual: 2D illustration of a figure kneeling in an open park area, with crossed-out power lines and tall buildings far in the background.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 7: 2D illustration of a figure kneeling in an open park area, with crossed-out power lines and tall buildings far in the background.. Narration context: "If you are outdoors, find a clear area away from buildings, power lines, and trees. Drop to the ground and stay there."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: When the shaking stops, put on sturdy shoes and evacuate carefully. Expect aftershocks, which can cause further damage to weakened structures.
scenes.visual: Flat 3D illustration of a person putting on boots and walking outside with an emergency go-bag.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 8: Flat 3D illustration of a person putting on boots and walking outside with an emergency go-bag.. Narration context: "When the shaking stops, put on sturdy shoes and evacuate carefully. Expect aftershocks, which can cause further damage to weakened structures."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Check for fires and immediately turn off gas lines. Never light matches or use electrical switches if you suspect a gas leak.
scenes.visual: 2D vector icon of a hand turning off a gas valve next to a crossed-out match symbol.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. clean flat 3D illustration, minimal, white background, soft shadows, blue accent colors, educational infographic, high quality. Scene 9: 2D vector icon of a hand turning off a gas valve next to a crossed-out match symbol.. Narration context: "Check for fires and immediately turn off gas lines. Never light matches or use electrical switches if you suspect a gas leak."

scenes.title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
scenes.narration: Near coasts, move to higher ground immediately to escape potential tsunamis. In mountains, stay alert for falling rocks, landslides, or blocked streams.
scenes.visual: Simple 2D flat landscape showing a path leading up a hill away from the ocean and a warning sign for falling rocks.
